ddls:
CREATE TABLE "housing_data" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each housing record */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to neighborhoods table */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., Single Family, Condo) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "square_footage" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Local unemployment rate */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median household income in the area */,
  "air_quality_index" REAL /* Local air quality index */,
  "proximity_to_water" REAL /* Distance to the nearest body of water */,
  "CRIM" REAL /* Crime rate per capita */,
  "ZN" REAL /* Proportion of residential land zoned for lots over 25,000 sq.ft. */,
  "INDUS" REAL /* Proportion of non-retail business acres per town */,
  "CHAS" REAL /* Charles River dummy variable */,
  "NOX" REAL /* Nitrogen oxide concentration */,
  "RM" REAL /* Average number of rooms per dwelling */,
  "AGE" REAL /* Proportion of owner-occupied units built prior to 1940 */,
  "DIS" REAL /* Weighted distances to five Boston employment centers */,
  "RAD" REAL /* Index of accessibility to radial highways */,
  "TAX" REAL /* Full-value property-tax rate per $10,000 */,
  "PTRATIO" REAL /* Pupil-teacher ratio by town */,
  "B" REAL /* 1000(Bk - 0.63)^2 where Bk is the proportion of blacks by town */,
  "LSTAT" REAL /* Lower status of the population */,
  "MEDV" REAL /* Median house price in $1000 */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_housing_data_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "housing_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to housing_data */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  "feature_category" TEXT /* Category of the feature (e.g., Transportation, Education) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Overall crime rate for the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zoning_regulations" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zoning regulation */,
  "housing_data_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to housing_data */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of zoning regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zoning regulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_centers" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment center */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the employment center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each housing record
Type of property (e.g., Single Family, Condo)
Total square footage of the property

Distance to the nearest body of water
